title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: a lightweight, extensible framework for running large language models locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and SDK for Ollama; one-liner pip install gives chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete, and model creation.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: First-class LangChain integration; use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embedding endpoints inside any LangChain pipeline.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and user management.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-hub
summary: Community “hub” of Modelfiles, curated prompts, and example Docker stacks for dozens of niche models.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Plug-and-play Streamlit chat component that proxies to Ollama; deploy a private ChatGPT clone in 30 lines.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module that exposes Ollama as REST & WebSocket microservice with Swagger docs and JWT auth.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama HTTP API; tokio-native with serde types.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama; small surface area, generate/chat/embed, and automatic model pulling.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model to your server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI for Ollama with model manager, chat history export, and dark theme.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an “AI assistant” pane powered by any local Ollama model; inline prompts and templating.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment recipe for scaling Ollama inference across multiple GPUs and nodes with autoscaling.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightning-fast Slack bot built on Bolt-js that streams Ollama responses into threads with reaction-based feedback.
